---
title: "Your Project Title"
author: 
  - "Alex Delamer"
  - "Duc Hoang"
  - "Aatish Prasad"
  - "Kishori Akola"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-section: true
bibliography: references.bib
execute:
  echo: false
  output: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Test

@ramos_e-commerce_nodate
